name: trust-copilot
description: Trust Copilot monorepo — run dev:all to start Postgres, API, web, and worker

scripts.dev:web: node scripts/check-port-3000.js && cd apps/web && npm run dev
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n api,web,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
